channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Retroid Pocket 5 and Flip 2 are getting a spec bump, but will cost $10 more after July 14
item.description: Even older emulation-focused handhelds can't escape RAMaggedon.

item.title: YouTuber smashes Guinness World Record for longest drone flight with a huge 261-minute time
item.description: Luke Bell earns Guinness World Record after flying a custom-built multirotor drone continuously for 4 hours, 21 minutes, and 39 seconds.

item.title: Guy who took photo of Jupiter with a Game Boy Camera and giant telescope publishes DIY tutorial
item.description: The latest adventure for the kooky camera looks skyward.

item.title: OpenAI releases a new ChatGPT tool for all things work related
item.description: OpenAI's long-awaited super app is here.

item.title: Shared API keys expose AI agents at 69% of enterprises, new VentureBeat research finds
item.description: Share one API key across five AI agents, and a single compromised agent inherits the reach of all five. The attacker immediately benefits from the accumulated permissions of every workflow that the key touches. The forensic trail goes cold at the credential level because five agents on one account leave no record of which agent did what.Sixty-nine percent of enterprises run agents with credential sharing somewhere in their deployments, according to VentureBeat’s June 2026 Pulse Research wave of 107 enterprises. That one number explains the buying spree reshaping enterprise security this year. ...

item.title: The ChatGPT browser is already dead
item.description: OpenAI is already shutting down ChatGPT Atlas, its browser that could do tasks for you on your behalf, less than a year after launching it. Atlas was announced in October, but as part of its wave of news about ChatGPT Work today, the company confirmed that it will be "sunsetting" Atlas and is targeting an […]

item.title: The floatable, powerful Soundcore Boom 2 speaker is over half off
item.description: Bluetooth speakers with big sound and great features are hard to find for under $100, with most offerings being some variation of the same basic (and often small) design. Thankfully, through July 10th Woot has the Anker Soundcore Boom 2 on sale for $69.99, which is $20 cheaper than the discounted price at other retailers […]

item.title: The economic cost of Trump’s clean energy rollbacks has been enormous—and it’s still growing
item.description: More than 200 major clean energy projects have been cancelled or downsized since Trump took office, costing nearly half a million jobs and $55 billion in annual GDP growth. It’s been a little more than a year since the One Big Beautiful Bill Act began dismantling federal clean energy incentives—just one part of the Trump administration’s broader attacks on renewables, from freezing funds and canceling permits to paying developers to cancel plans for offshore wind. A new report tallies what the policy shift has cost the economy. ...

item.title: An electric drone just set a new world air speed record - 434 mph device could be ideal for anti-aircraft interceptor action
item.description: Quantum Systems’ Apex Recordhunter drone unofficially broke the world speed record, hitting 434 mph.

item.title: GLP-1s are inescapable online. Heres why thats a problem.
item.description: Weight loss is big business on social media — and some are paying a price.

item.title: World Cup sponsors are already thinking about 2027
item.description: And the smart sponsors have a women’s sports strategy. This summer, billions of dollars have poured into FIFA Men’s World Cup sponsorships.

item.title: Google will now tell you if an ad was made with AI
item.description: You can see if ads on Google Search, Google Discover, and YouTube were made or edited using AI from a new section in Google's "My Ad Center," as reported earlier by TechCrunch. The update, announced on Thursday, adds a "created or edited with AI" label under the "how this ad was made" tab. Users can […]

item.title: AI-generated ads on Google will hopefully get disclosures soon
item.description: If Google's AI tools are used, it will automatically be noted in My Ad Center.

item.title: Don’t buy a smart lock until you watch this (Nuki keypad 2 NFC and Aliro testing)
item.description: We test the Nuki smart lock with the new Aliro standard and explain how the CSA's digital key technology could shape the future of smart home access.

item.title: Dysons newest Airwrap just got an update and new attachments — including a first-time addition to any Airwrap
item.description: Dyson released the latest version of the Airwrap Co-anda2x. Our beauty tech expert breaks down everything new about the tool, from the attachments to new motor, and what it means for your styling experience.

item.title: Aviation pioneer and space-travel record breaker Wally Funk dies at 87
item.description: Funk became the oldest person to fly in space in 2021.

item.title: Meta enters the crowded AI coding battle with Muse Spark 1.1
item.description: Meta's pitch to users is Spark's ability to handle large agentic workloads, fix bugs, and help with large code migrations — the kind of automation that enterprises are increasingly turning to AI companies to provide.
